Scenario.overview: Communications Industry Simple A basic-level cyber attack leveraging phishing emails to deliver Pikabot malware, leading to data encryption and operational disruption.
Scenario.attack_surface: AVAILABLE_SURFACES: Internet-facing assets, Employee Devices, File System
Scenario.attack_vector: AVAILABLE_VECTORS: Email, Attachment, Command Line Interface

stage.name: Initial Access
stage.description: An email containing a malicious attachment is sent to employees, tricking them into opening it.

stage.name: Execution
stage.capec: CAPEC-635: Alternative Execution Due to Deceptive Filenames
stage.description: The malicious attachment, when opened, executes Pikabot malware using the reg.exe utility.

stage.name: Impact
stage.description: The Pikabot malware deploys ransomware to encrypt files on the system, impacting communication systems and data availability.

Scenario.summary: Basic attackers distribute Pikabot through phishing emails, leading to execution of malware and subsequent data encryption, disrupting communications operations.
